_doc: ROI definitions per experiment. Coordinates are (x, y, w, h) in pixels of the cropped image (after cam_range).
_coordinate_system: x = horizontal (column index), y = vertical (row index), origin top-left. Inclusive of (x,y), spans w pixels right and h pixels down.

horizontal_push_689UNTESTED.description: 689 nm horizontal push spectroscopy. Port 2 is the pushed cloud, port 1 is the unpushed cloud.

dipole_trap_freq.description: Axial trap frequency scan. Single MOT cloud, total counts in one ROI.

dipole_trap_lifetime.description: Dipole trap lifetime scan. Single MOT cloud, total counts in one ROI.
